ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] The rain has indeed delayed our caravans and supplies are scarce as they are." (Elara's Emotional State reflecting empathy towards the player) "I understand your urgency; however, discounts cannot be offered freely in times like these. But I can offer you one vial for a fair price considering our circumstances and if we manage to remain talkative and focused."<TAB>

[baseline_no_context] Trust comes from faith and understanding, not haste," the priest mused quietly to himself before responding with calm assurance, "I can offer you what is best for your journey at fair prices. <TAB>3<TAB>5<TATAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>4 - Trust and caution in line with persona
